// <auto-generated />
using SourceGen.Ioc;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
[assembly: IocRegisterDefaults(typeof(IHandler<CreateUserCommand>), ServiceLifetime.Transient, ImplementationTypes = [typeof(MyApp.Handlers.CreateUserHandler)])]
[assembly: IocRegisterDefaults(typeof(IHandler<UpdateUserCommand>), ServiceLifetime.Transient, ImplementationTypes = [typeof(MyApp.Handlers.UpdateUserHandler)])]
